channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VGUARD] V-Guard Industries Faces Order from Commissioner of Customs with INR 3.75 Crore Fine
item.description:
V-Guard Industries Ltd. has received an Order from the Commissioner of Customs (NS-V), JNCH, alleging misclassification of certain parts of products. The authority has re-classified the goods and confirmed a differential duty demand of INR 1,62,59,112 including interest. Penalties under Sections 114A and 114AA amounting to INR 2.12 crores have also been imposed. The Order relates to imports spanning from September 9, 2019 to June 11, 2024. The company is evaluating the merits of the order and will undertake appropriate steps including filing an appeal before CESTAT within prescribed time limits.

  • V-Guard Industries Ltd. received an Order from the Commissioner of Customs (NS-V), JNCH
  • Order alleges misclassification of certain parts of products
  • Differential duty demand of INR 1,62,59,112 including interest confirmed
  • Penalties under Sections 114A and 114AA amounting to INR 2.12 crores imposed
  • Company evaluating the merits of the order and planning to file an appeal before CESTAT

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: V-GUARD INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [IFGLEXPOR] Director and CEO of IFGL Refractories Ltd Resigns for Personal Reasons
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IFGL Refractories Ltd announced that its Director and Chief Executive Officer India, Mr. Arasu Shanmugam, has tendered his resignation due to personal reasons. His resignation is effective from the close of working hours on 6th April, 2026. Mr. Shanmugam has been with the organization since an unspecified date, and his tenure has been both professionally rewarding and personally enriching. He has assured a smooth transition and expressed his confidence in the continued success of the business.

  • Mr. Arasu Shanmugam resigns from his position as Director and CEO of IFGL Refractories Ltd.
  • His resignation is due to personal reasons and is effective from 6th April, 2026.
  • Mr. Shanmugam has been a valuable contributor to the growth and transformation of the company's India operations.
  • He is committed to ensuring a smooth transition during his notice period.
  • The company has assured that the announcement is also available on its website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFGL Refractories Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VGUARD] V-Guard Industries Receives Final Audit Report from Assistant Commissioner, CGST-Audit Circle, Kashipur
item.description:
🔥 Trending

V-Guard Industries Ltd. has received the final audit report from the Assistant Commissioner, CGST-Audit Circle, Kashipur, under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The report is in response to the company's earlier intimation dated February 1, 2026. The company has received a short payment demand of INR 17,75,91,197 for the financial years 2020-21 to 2023-24, along with interest and penalty, which is yet to be quantified. The company is evaluating the report and plans to challenge the observations on merit.

  • V-Guard Industries Ltd. received the final audit report from the Assistant Commissioner, CGST-Audit Circle, Kashipur
  • The report is in response to the company's earlier intimation dated February 1, 2026
  • The company has received a short payment demand of INR 17,75,91,197 for the financial years 2020-21 to 2023-24
  • Interest and penalty of an unquantified amount have also been demanded
  • The company is evaluating the report and plans to challenge the observations on merit

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: V-GUARD INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Audit

item.title: [MANGIND] Yatin Sanjay Gupte and Wardwizard Solutions India Private Limited Create Pledge of 1,75,43,895 Equity Shares in Favor of Blacksoil Capital Private Limited
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Yatin Sanjay Gupte. The disclosure is for the creation of a pledge of 1,75,43,895 equity shares in favor of Blacksoil Capital Private Limited. The pledge is made by Yatin Sanjay Gupte and Wardwizard Solutions India Private Limited. The total share capital/voting capital to be taken as per the latest filing done by the company to the Stock Exchange is Rs. 1,42,51,29,928/- divided into 1,42,51,29,928 equity shares of Re. 1/- each. The shares are listed on BSE Limited.

  • Yatin Sanjay Gupte and Wardwizard Solutions India Private Limited create a pledge of 1,75,43,895 equity shares.
  • The pledge is made in favor of Blacksoil Capital Private Limited.
  • The total share capital/voting capital to be taken as per the latest filing done by the company to the Stock Exchange is Rs. 1,42,51,29,928/- divided into 1,42,51,29,928 equity shares of Re. 1/- each.
  • The shares are listed on BSE Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mangalam Industrial Finance Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [AHLUCONT] Ahluwalia Contracts Complies with SEBI LODR Regulations After NSE Warning
item.description:
Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd. has addressed a clarification from the National Stock Exchange (NSE) regarding the non-compliance of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company held its Risk Management Committee meetings on 13th February 2023 and 10th November 2023, with a gap of 270 days, which is more than the allowed 180 days between meetings. The company acknowledges the oversight and ensures future compliance with Regulation 21(3C) of SEBI LODR. The delay in informing the Stock Exchange was unintentional and will be avoided in the future.

  • Ahluwalia Contracts addressed a clarification from NSE regarding non-compliance of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • The company held Risk Management Committee meetings on 13th February 2023 and 10th November 2023 with a gap of 270 days.
  • The company acknowledges the oversight and ensures future compliance with Regulation 21(3C) of SEBI LODR.
  • The delay in informing the Stock Exchange was unintentional and will be avoided in the future.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AHLUWALIA CONTRACTS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PERSISTENT] Persistent Systems Ranked 3rd in India's Most Sustainable Companies, Signaling Discipline at Scale
item.description:
Persistent Systems Ltd, a global leader in Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization, has been recognized among BW Businessworld Group’s India’s Most Sustainable Companies (IMSC) 2024 - 25, ranking 3rd overall and 2nd in the Information Technology and Digital Services sector. This recognition underscores Persistent's commitment to sustainability, which is embedded into its operating model, including risk management, procurement, talent practices, and client delivery. The Company is evaluated annually by leading global ESG rating agencies and is a signatory to the UN Global Compact. Persistent's latest scores demonstrate its commitment and leadership in responsible business practices.

  • Ranked 3rd overall in India's Most Sustainable Companies 2024 - 25
  • Ranked 2nd in the IT and Digital Services sector
  • Sustainability is embedded into Persistent's operating model
  • Evaluated annually by leading global ESG rating agencies
  • A signatory to the UN Global Compact

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PERSISTENT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [ARUNIS] Kalind Ltd Seeks No-Objection from BSE for Re-classification of Shareholders from Promoter to Public Category
item.description:
Kalind Ltd has made an application to BSE Limited for re-classification of two shareholders from the 'Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category. This decision is subject to no objection/approval of the BSE Limited and other necessary approvals/confirmations/consents. The company will make necessary disclosures on the material developments as per the statutory requirements.

  • Kalind Ltd seeks no-objection from BSE for re-classification of shareholders
  • Two shareholders, Yagnik Bharatkumar Tank and Deniis Bhupendra Desai, are to be re-classified from 'Promoter Group' to 'Public' category
  • The re-classification is subject to approval from BSE Limited and other necessary approvals
  • The company will make necessary disclosures on the material developments as per the statutory requirements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arunis Abode Ltd | Category: Re-classification

item.title: [KJMCFIN] KJMC Financial Services Limited Appoints New Statutory Auditors Following Merger
item.description:
KJMC Financial Services Limited has announced an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM) to be held on Saturday, 02nd May 2026 at 03.30 P.M through VC/OAVM. The meeting is to transact special business including the appointment of M/s. TLB & Co., Chartered Accountants as the new Statutory Auditors due to the merger of M/s. V.P. Thacker & Co., Chartered Accountants with M/s. LODHA & BHATT. The appointment will take effect from the conclusion of the EOGM and continue until the conclusion of the 38th Annual General Meeting of the Company for the financial year 2025-26.

  • KJMC Financial Services Limited to hold an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on 02nd May 2026
  • M/s. V.P. Thacker & Co., Chartered Accountants has merged with M/s. LODHA & BHATT
  • M/s. TLB & Co., Chartered Accountants to be appointed as new Statutory Auditors
  • The appointment will be effective from the conclusion of the EOGM
  • The appointment will continue until the conclusion of the 38th Annual General Meeting of the Company for the financial year 2025-26

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KJMC FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GINNIFILA] Ginni Filaments Ltd: No Requests Processed in Special Window for Re-lodgment of Physical Shares in March 2026
item.description:
Ginni Filaments Ltd has released a report on the special window for re-lodgment of transfer of physical shares for the period 10th March, 2026 to 31st March, 2026. The report, provided by M/s Skyline Financial Services Private Limited, Registrar and Share Transfer Agent of the Company, indicates that no requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected during this period. This information is being hosted on the Company’s website at www.ginnifilaments.com.

  • No requests were received for re-lodgment of physical shares in March 2026.
  • No requests were processed for re-lodgment of physical shares in March 2026.
  • No requests were approved for re-lodgment of physical shares in March 2026.
  • No requests were rejected for re-lodgment of physical shares in March 2026.
  • The report is in accordance with the SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GINNI FILAMENTS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [APLLTD] Alembic Pharmaceuticals Receives USFDA Final Approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets
item.description:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced that it has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg. The approved ANDA is therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug product (RLD), Farxiga Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, of AstraZeneca AB. Dapagliflozin tablet is a sodium-glucose cotransporter 2 (SGLT2) inhibitor indicated for reducing the risk of hospitalization for heart failure in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus and either established cardiovascular disease or multiple cardiovascular risk factors, and as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Alembic was one of the first ANDA applicants to submit a substantially complete ANDA with a paragraph IV certification for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, making it eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity. The estimated market size of Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, is US$ 10,487 million for twelve months ending December 2025 according to IQVIA.

  • Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited receives USFDA Final Approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg
  • The approved ANDA is therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug product (RLD), Farxiga Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, of AstraZeneca AB
  • Dapagliflozin tablet is a sodium-glucose cotransporter 2 (SGLT2) inhibitor indicated for specific uses in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus
  • Alembic was one of the first ANDA applicants, making it eligible for 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity
  • The estimated market size of Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, is US$ 10,487 million for twelve months ending December 2025 according to IQVIA

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALEMBIC PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: USFDA
